channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Israeli leader Benjamin Netanyahu will visit Orbán in Hungary, defying international arrest warrant
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is scheduled to arrive in Hungary's capital on Wednesday to meet with the country's nationalist prime minister despite an international arrest warrant for the Israeli leader over the war in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Val Kilmer, 'Top Gun' and Batman star with an intense approach, dies at 65
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Val Kilmer, the brooding, versatile actor who played fan favorite Iceman in “Top Gun,” donned a voluminous cape as Batman in “Batman Forever” and portrayed Jim Morrison in “The Doors,” has died. He was 65.
item.dc:creator: MARK KENNEDY and ANDREW DALTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 4 key takeaways as Trump’s sweeping HHS layoffs begin
item.description: Thousands of employees across the vast Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) began receiving layoff notices as early as 5 a.m. on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, WGN 9

item.title: Trump is set to announce 'reciprocal' tariffs in a risky move that could reshape the economy
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After weeks of White House hype and public anxiety, President Donald Trump is set Wednesday to announce a barrage of self-described reciprocal tariffs on friend and foe alike. The new tariffs, coming on what Trump has called “Liberation Day,” are a bid to boost U.S.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: China conducts military drills focusing on Taiwan Strait
item.description: TAIPEI, Taiwan (AP) — China conducted military drills around Taiwan for a second day Wednesday, focusing on the Taiwan Strait — a crucial conduit for international trade separating the self-governing island democracy from China.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER BODEEN and JOHNSON LAI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Why Tesla may avoid the blow of Trump's auto tariffs
item.description: Elon Musk’s focus on American-made products at Tesla could shield his company from the brunt of President Donald Trump’s new tariffs on foreign vehicles and automobile parts.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, KREX 5

item.title: Dirt bikes, ATVs driven around World War II memorial in Washington, DC: video
item.description: Authorities are working to identify people seen on video driving ATVs and dirt bikes inside the World War II memorial in Washington, D.C., over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Republican Jimmy Patronis wins special election for Gaetz's Florida seat
item.description: Florida chief financial officer Jimmy Patronis was projected to win the special election to replace former Rep. Matt Gatez (R-Fla.) in the 1st Congressional District, defeating Democrat Gay Valimont, according to Decision Desk HQ.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Booker sets record for longest Senate speech in history
item.description: Sen. Cory Booker (D-N.J.) on Tuesday set a new record for the longest floor speech in Senate history, having held the floor for 25 hours and 5 minutes to decry potential GOP spending cuts in their looming tax bill and policies put in place by the Trump administration. Booker, the No.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Most immigrants at risk of deportation from US are Christian, report finds
item.description: As many as four in five immigrants at risk of deportation from the United States are Christian, according to a new report that calls on their fellow believers to consider the impact of the Trump administration's aggressive deportation policies.
item.dc:creator: PETER SMITH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: An ‘administrative error’ sent a Maryland man to an El Salvador prison, ICE says
item.description: President Donald Trump’ s administration has acknowledged mistakenly deporting a Maryland man with protected legal status to a notorious El Salvador prison last month, but is arguing against returning him to the United States because of his alleged gang ties and the U.S.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: San Diego migrant shelter closes doors with numbers plummeting after Trump immigration crackdown: report
item.description: A San Diego migrant shelter is reportedly closing its doors and reverting to its original purpose after the number of asylum seekers dramatically drops.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump administration admits it wrongly deported man to prison in El Salvador
item.description: The Trump administration acknowledged that it had mistakenly deported a Salvadoran man protected from removal.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, Fox 5

item.title: Social Security Administration probes origin of website portal outage
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Social Security Administration said Tuesday that it is investigating the root cause of website outages that have affected the “my Social Security” portal where recipients access their benefits.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Watch: Potential albino pygmy killer whale spotted off Hawaii
item.description: "We noticed there was a white baby with them," said Travis Woo, a safety diver. "My initial reaction was euphoria.
item.dc:creator: Alina Lee, NewsNation

item.title: WATCH: Man hears scratching, finds 9-foot alligator in his home
item.description: A nine-foot-long alligator was captured by deputies and a Louisiana man after making its way into a home.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bondi directs DOJ to seek death penalty in Luigi Mangione case
item.description: U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi has directed the Department of Justice to seek the death penalty against Luigi Mangione, the man accused of murdering UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson last year.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Investigation into death of former Yankees player's son turns to carbon monoxide: reports
item.description: Investigators in Costa Rica say carbon monoxide may instead be to blame for the death of Miller Gardner, the 14-year-old son of former Yankees outfielder Brett Gardner.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: House Intel Democrats call for damage assessment on Signal chat
item.description: Democrats on the House Intelligence Committee on Monday requested an independent assessment into Trump administration officials' use of Signal to discuss an airstrike, asking that Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard initiate such a process and delegate it to another official.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Booker talks through the night in marathon floor speech to protest Trump
item.description: Sen. Cory Booker (D-N.J.) pulled an all-nighter, delivering a marathon speech on the Senate floor that lasted well into Tuesday morning in a push to combat the Trump administration’s policies. Booker, a member of Democratic leadership, rose to speak around 7 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, Fox 5

item.title: Layoffs begin at US health agencies charged with tracking disease, researching, regulating food
item.description: Employees across the massive U.S. Department of Health and Human Services began receiving notices of dismissal on Tuesday in a major overhaul expected to ultimately lay off up to 10,000 people.
item.dc:creator: CARLA K. JOHNSON AP Medical Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Almost 40 percent of Americans report facing extreme weather: Survey
item.description: Nearly 40 percent of Americans experienced extreme weather last year — and those who did were more likely to be concerned about climate change, according to new polling.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Democratic-backed Susan Crawford wins Wisconsin Supreme Court seat, cementing liberal majority
item.description: The Democratic-backed candidate for Wisconsin Supreme Court has won, defeating President Donald Trump’s endorsed challenger.
item.dc:creator: Scott Bauer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Wild weather blamed for deaths of 3 kids in Michigan and a man in an Amish buggy in Indiana
item.description: KALAMAZOO, Mich. (AP) — A tree fell on a van in Michigan, killing three children, during a fierce weekend storm that swept the region and contributed to the death of an 84-year-old man in an Amish buggy in Indiana, authorities said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Girl, 9, dies after procedure at California dental office
item.description: A report from the San Diego County Medical Examiner's Office claims the girl was discharged from the facility and remained asleep on the ride home.
item.dc:creator: Delaney White, ABC 4

item.title: NASA's newly returned astronauts say they would fly on Boeing's Starliner capsule again
item.description: CAPE CANAVERAL, Fla. (AP) — NASA’s celebrity astronauts Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams said Monday that they hold themselves partly responsible for what went wrong on their space sprint-turned-marathon and would fly on Boeing's Starliner again.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Remains found in California decades ago ID'd as missing New York 13-year-old
item.description: A 13-year-old girl who was found dead along a river in California's Santa Cruz County three decades ago was recently identified through DNA testing, investigators said.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump says he’s ‘not joking’ about a third term. Republicans insist he is
item.description: Congressional Republicans are brushing off President Trump’s latest comments about seeking a third term, downplaying them as a joke designed to needle the media even as the president insists he is serious.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WGN 9

item.title: Photos show living conditions of Connecticut man allegedly held captive for over 20 years
item.description: Dozens of photos obtained by Nexstar's WTNH show the living conditions authorities found in the Waterbury, Connecticut, home where a man says he was held captive by his stepmom, Kimberly Sullivan, for over 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Jenn Brink, KRON4

item.title: NASA astronauts Butch Wilmore, Suni Williams discuss extended ISS stay
item.description: NASA astronauts Butch Wilmore blasted into orbit in June 2024, as part of a test flight of Boeing’s new Starliner crew capsule. They were scheduled to return about eight days later, but problems plagued the mission.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: 9-year-old girl dies after leaving dental office
item.description: A dental office in Vista released a statement Sunday regarding the recent passing of a 9-year-old girl following a procedure at the facility.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, WFLA, NBC

item.title: NASA astronauts Butch Wilmore, Suni Williams discuss extended ISS stay
item.description: NASA astronauts Butch Wilmore blasted into orbit in June 2024, as part of a test flight of Boeing’s new Starliner crew capsule. They were scheduled to return about eight days later, but problems plagued the mission.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WGN 9

item.title: Epstein victim Virginia Giuffre says she has four days to live
item.description: Giuffre didn’t disclose when the accident happened, but said it has been the “worst start to the new year.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: 3 US soldiers found dead in armored vehicle in Lithuania; 1 still missing
item.description: Three of the U.S. Army soldiers who went missing in Lithuania have been found dead in their armored vehicle that was pulled from a swampy area early Monday, according to U.S. Army Europe and Africa Command. Another soldier is still missing.
item.dc:creator: By LIUDAS DAPKUS and LOLITA C. BALDOR Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Explosion at Detroit apartment building injures residents, including several children
item.description: When firefighters arrived, some people were in windows of the building “kind of hanging off ready to jump,” Fire Commissioner Chuck Simms told reporters.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Suns star Kevin Durant helped off court after injuring left leg
item.description: Phoenix Suns All-Star Kevin Durant was helped to the locker room with 6:57 left in the third quarter against Houston on Sunday night after falling to the floor in a collision with the Rockets' Jabari Smith Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 100+ children in Utah at risk to face immigration court alone due to federal cuts
item.description: With the Trump administration’s recent announcement to slash funding for the legal representation of immigrant children, one local organization is worried that 126 children that they oversee are now going to stand alone in the courtroom.
item.dc:creator: Yeonseung Kim, ABC 4
